rationale: In the citing paper, Berger and Milkman (2012) appears only in the prior-research literature list as one example of behavioral/content drivers of sharing (high-arousal emotions and positivity). The paper does not build hypotheses, measures, identification, or interpretation specifically on this source; the core theory and tests are based on agglomeration mechanisms instead. Because the citation is grouped background context without a distinct role for this specific work, its function is a passing mention.
